features: Elegant Gold Trim Design: Each gift bag features a sleek white finish with a luxurious gold trim design, creating a classy and upscale look perfect for any occasion.
Suitable Size for Small Gifts: Measuring 19× 15× 7 cm/7.48× 5.91× 2.76 inches, these bags are ideal for holding candles, cosmetics, jewelry boxes, and other small-sized presents.
Sturdy & Reusable: Made of thick, high-quality paper with reinforced handles, these bags are durable enough to be reused multiple times without tearing or losing shape.
Includes Tissue Paper and Ribbon: Each bag comes with a satin ribbon and a tissue paper that adds a beautiful finishing touch, making your gift presentation even more thoughtful and polished.
Multipurpose for All Occasions: Great for birthdays, weddings, baby showers, bridal parties, and holiday gift-giving—these stylish bags save time and elevate any celebration.
description: Product Features: 5 Pack Small Gift Bags with Ribbons and Handles, White Party Gift Bags Specifications: Product Material: Paper Product Color: White, Blue Product Size: 19× 15× 7 cm/7.48× 5.91× 2.76 inches Package Includes: 5× Gift Bag with Ribbons and Handles 5× Tissue Paper
